text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Inari, Inari! You gotta hear this!
I did something amazing today!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, what's the hubbub?
Take a breath.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I can't help it. Today, I ate lunch together
with Teio!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Get this — I had one more bowl of rice
than she did! Amazing, right?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Wow, big props to you! That's some real
spirit ya got there, Turbo!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Really? You think I did good?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yeah — ya gotta eat well to run well,
that's for sure. And you can eat with
the best of 'em!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Hehe… eheheh! Hehehe! Go on, Inari,
say even more cool stuff about me♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, look at the smirk on your mug.
Y'know I can't refuse a face like that.
